description.p: This is a community package of DBX, maintained independently.
DBX is a lightweight, fast desktop database client and management tool for relational, document, key-value, vector and analytical databases.

ul.li: Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse and more
Query editor with executable-statement markers, result-source tracking and export
Data grid with filtering, navigation and in-cell editing; ER diagrams and table-structure editing

description.p: This package talks to databases over the network. Its own settings live in its private per-app directory; ~/.dbx (JDBC driver agents) and ~/.duckdb (DuckDB extensions and secrets) are shared with the host. Local file databases (SQLite/DuckDB) and .sql scripts are opened through the file-chooser portal; to keep a local-file connection working across restarts, grant the path with "flatpak override --user --filesystem=/path/to/db com.dbxio.dbx".

SSH access is not granted by default. The SSH-tunnel feature reads ~/.ssh/config and private keys; if you use it, grant read-only access with "flatpak override --user --filesystem=~/.ssh:ro com.dbxio.dbx".

screenshot.caption: Browsing data with the data grid
Exploring relationships with the ER diagram
Editing and filtering the data grid
